subcodes.first_line: This is a letter from the Sovereign of existence unto one among His handmaidens, that she may be gladdened through the grace of God and detached from all else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این نامه ایست از سلطان وجود بامه از اماء خود تا بعنایت حق مسرور باشد و از خلق
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
